text: I am filled with a sense of curiosity and anticipation here. The first scene, with its glass-walled room and focused individuals, resembles a modern temple for collective intellect—perhaps a meeting or workshop. The hum of activity, even behind closed doors, hints at ideas in motion. Stepping away, I find myself moved by the bold R+D display. It celebrates innovation as an open-ended experiment, where humans and machines co-evolve. The visuals and the energy here inspire me to contemplate the future and my place in it, as an observer and, perhaps, as a participant in this unfolding story of knowledge and creation.
